Values:

Other values from Mode
Comment:
RlMd has almost the same values as Mode
In Heat/Cool mode (33024), 

33024 = 0b10000001 00000000
Removing the upper byte give the real mode 
33040 & 0xff = 16 → heat
33024 & 0xff = 0 → idle
33088 & 0xff = 64 → cool
